feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Data Action based on Attributes
entry.content:
Hi friends,

I'm currently facing a challenge with generating cost rates and would appreciate your input.

The scenario:

I have actual data that includes both costs and quantities. Using this data, I calculate cost rates through a Data Action. These rates are then multiplied by the forecasted quantities to estimate forecasted costs.

The issue:

In some cases, the forecast includes quantities for certain materials that do not have corresponding values in the actual data. For these cases, I want to apply the average cost rate per Material Group. Each material has a property called Material Group.

My question:

How can I set up a Data Action that calculates the average cost rate per Material Group, so I can use it for materials without actual data and multiply it by their forecasted quantities?

Model setup:

  • One Measure: Amount

  • One Account Dimension: contains both Costs and Quantities

  • Material (Property: Material Group)
  • Customer
  • Further Dimensions

Thank you in advance for your help!

@N1kh1l any ideas?

Kind regards,
Ismail

entry.title: Error in classic story conversion of "Root path missing from hierarchy path"
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am converting Analytics Cloud Classic Stories to the Optimized Design Experience and get this error in some:

("Something went wrong while converting the story to Optimized Design Experience.  Root missing from hierarchy path.")

has anyone else run into this error and, if so, how did you resolve?

Thanks, Dan

entry.title: Multi-Action Starter in a Story (ODE) - Populate parameters dynamically
entry.content:
Hello - I understand that, we can use multi-action starters in SAC Stories. When we click on the starter, the system prompts a pop-up to fill parameters before running.

Is there anyway that we can pass values to these parameters dynamically (using script varialbes)? I know, we can define Input Controls or use Story Filter. But I need to populate these prompts based on a specific logic in onInitialization event.

Any pointers would be great. If not, I would have to go with a button and call the multi action with respective script variables.

Thanks,

PS

entry.title: Previous year's measure cannot be displayed in table with account dimensions
entry.content:
Hi Team，

Define table including account dimension.

When attempting to create a limit measure for the previous year's results, the account dimension's calculated measure only allows the selection of “Shift Previous Value” and fails to display the previous year's results on the column axis.
How can we display the prior year actuals in the columns?

※Please find the layout attached for your review.

・I want to display the previous year's results as columns as shown on the left.

・The image on the right was tried with a restricted measure, Can't do it because “Shift previous value” is not shown.

Thanks,

Taniguchi

entry.title: Joule error in S4HC public when accessing SAC: No access to service
entry.content:
Dear all,

I'm currently testing Joule in a Partner TDD S4HANA Cloud public system... and since the Analytical insights feature seems now generally available I wanted to try this out by using SAC as source, as well.

My SAC system is also TDD, so it has already Version: 2025.8.3 - I know that the regular SAC Q2 update will come on the weekend May 17/18. So a regular SAC tenant might not yet work as of today.

I could include the SAC system successfully into the formation like described here.

My user settings in S4HC are in English, and my question is posted in English as well, since this is currently a prerequisite.

All 3 systems: S4HC, Joule and SAC use the same Identity Authentication Service, and I myself am system owner in SAC, so I have full authorization. We have a Import model indexed via Just Ask, and questions & answers there work fine.

But when using Joule the following error message appears:

Based on this response, it looks like Joule "knows" that it should access the SAC tenant, but obviously the login does not work 😞

My question is: Why not? What is the trick?

My assumption is, the root cause is lying somehow in the login procedure... but when I check in SAC: System - Administration - App Integration, I can see:

- One managed OAUTH Client: JOULE_OAUTH_CLIENT_etc_etc...

- One Trusted Identity Provider: JOULE_IDP_etc_etc...

So I would assume there is a working server to server communication?

FYI: Login into our SAC via the IDP is done via the specific SAML Attribute: User ID, which is also stored in the IDP User ID (If I would store the e-mail address there, I could no longer log into SAC. However mail address is used as Fallback method - without positive effect for my issue). The S4HC User of course is not aware of this. There we have the e-mail address, we have the HR ID P0000xx and we have a CB9980000xx auto-generated User ID.

Is anybody in the community here facing the same problem?

Or who is already able to use Joule with SAC results... and how is your SAC login configured?

Thanks for any feedback.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Tab vs Drop Down Option to List Pages in a Story
entry.content:
Hi @mz_geekie , @mfoeken @TuncayKaraca @DebjitSingha ,
You can follow below steps to enable Tab Bar option as default view option in SAC Optimized view mode. 

  1. Option 'Left Panel'
  2. Go to 'Outline' > 'Global Settings' > 'Navigation'
  3. Enable the toggle "Override default Settings " and Click Done.
  4. Save the Story. 

PFA the Snapshot for your reference.

entry.title: cumulative delta calculation using data actions in SAC
entry.content:
We have a requirement to calculate the cumulative delta across the planning horizon(example from Jan 2025 to Dec 2026) ,we have 3 specific measures namely

1. IR_Shift ,2.CP_Rates ,3. Refreshed_rates

Ir_shift is the data action calculated measure where as cp_rates and refreshed_rates are input measure.

For the initial month of the planning horizon IR Shift is the difference of refreshed rates and cp rates(ir shift =refreshed - cp) progressively for  the  next month should be refreshed and cp difference minus previous month  ir shift and for the 3rd month should be refreshed and cp difference minus  sum of previous  2 month  ir shift.

In the below table we have values from Jan to Dec and the formulas will be

for 1st month ir_shift=refrehsed-cp  (1000-50)

for 2nd month ir =(2000-100)-950

similarly for 12th month ir = (refreshed - cp) - sum( all the 11 months ir_shift)

MeasuresJANFEBMARAPRMAYJUNJULAUGSEPOCTNOVDEC
IR_Shift950950102086010801110940105099010201020800
CP_Rates5010080220140309040503010210
Refreshed_Rates100020003000400050006000700080009000100001100012000

 

seeking Help for the data action script

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Data Action for Aggregation on Dimension Property
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

In the table below, you'll see values associated with the account member COMA032_%. The dimensions involved are PLG1 (Property of Material) and Material. I have multiple PLG1 properties, and I’d like to aggregate (sum) all values under COMA032_% and write the result to a new account member called COMA032_%_Material.

This new account member should show the sum of values per PLG1, aggregated across all Materials.

Has anyone written a data action to achieve something similar? I’ve attempted a solution but haven’t been able to get it working correctly.

 

Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: How to have the table dimension and measures in the same row during the export to excel
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently the exported excel has two rows for dimension and measure, how to make them in one row?

I try to put the Measures to the Rows but then the measure members will not in column. Is there any other way to implement this, except manually modify after the export?

Thank you of the help.

Regards,

Jason

entry.title: Creating an SAC story with members from different Hierachy
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am working on creating an SAC story which has members from different hierarchy.

Here, the CF_  accounts (shown in table 1) and table 2 accounts are part of different hierarchy as shown below.

 

 

Currently I have created two different tables for different hierarchy. I want all of them together in a single table.

Can someone please assist me here?

entry.title: Can I have multiple dashboards with different models in a Single SAC story?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I have a doubt, when I am importing a dashboard to a story the dashboards default model gets changed to another model which is already present in the story. When I try to change it to the required one then the other dashboard default model changes as if both can have only one default model.

Please tell me if it's possible as I have multiple dashboards with different models which I want to import in one story and because of this default model problem my input controls are not working.

entry.title: SAC - how to remove all filters on a table (or reset!)
entry.content:
Hi all

I have a simple dashboard containing of 5 input controls, 2 charts with Linked Analysis turned on and a table.

Sometimes the user will use the input controls to filter, sometimes they will click the charts to filter and other times they will rightclick a value in the table and filter on it there.

 

I need a way to "reset" the dashboard without knowing what the user has done. It seems to me, that table_1.getdatasource.removedimension filters does NOT work if it's been set via the input control or via the right click. And why the .... are there no 'removeallfilters' like there was in Lumira Designer?!?

And I cannot find any way to reset the entire dashboard to come back to square 1... How do people do this??

entry.title: SAC - Week number calculation depending from "date input control" and "pc system date"
entry.content:
Hello everyone

I really need your help to calculate the number of weeks, between an "date input control" and the pc system date (of course this value should be recalculated every time I change the date in the "date input control").

Then I need to use this value (named as example WeekNum) to calculate the average of the turnover, that is AvgTurnOver = Turnover / WeekNum

So I have an input date control (upper left side of my printscreen), in this case Apr 2025, and I want to calculate a new measure that depends from this date in weeks since 01 Jan of the year of input date control.

 

 

In this case, if I count the weeks between 01/01/2025 and 30/04/2025 they are 17 and then I should use this value to calculate the average.

Suppose I change the date input control to Nov 2024, I need to have as result the number of weeks between 01/01/2024 and 30/11/2024.

How can I achieve this in a formula calculation?

Thank you for your support , I really appreciate your suggest

Adriano

entry.title: Set story filters api based on input control
entry.content:
Hi SAC community,

Is it possible to set story filters based on input control selections in a prompt when opening the story?

If yes, can you please provide an example code?

Best regards,

entry.title: Allocate data from parent to child node
entry.content:
Hello, SAC community:

I have a dimension product with 2 hierarchies, one with multiple levels and the other one with the parents as root members. It looks like this:

 

In H1, 010105 has 0101 as parent, and 0101 has 01 as parent. In H2, only 01 appears as <root>. I'd like to introduce data at parent level using H2 and then be able to allocate it to its children equally or with weights depending in another year, for example. Is there any way to do this in a Data Action?

I've also thought about creating some dummy leaf members and showing these when the user inputs the data, but I don't know how to allocate the data if the data is in a leaf member. Doing a loop seems useless since it would need a parameter for each member that tells the number of siblings it has, and that just feels like bad desing.

 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Non Standard Allocation in SAC
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are trying to create non-standard allocation logic via Advanced formula step. Any suggestions on How we can configure this via advanced formula or standard allocation or mix of both. 

Existing mapping between source and driver account data

ITEM CODEDiver account
SL1000AAC1
SL3000AAC2
SL8000AAC3
SL1000AAC4

Input data

AUDITTRAILVERSIONTIMECOMPCODEACCOUNTCOSTCENTERITEM_CODECOLLECTIONCHANNEL COUNTRY BRAND GENDERPRODUCT Amount
DT01BUDGET202412CC01AAC5COSTC1SL1000#2####200.00

Driver based on existing mix %

AUDIT TRAILVERSIONTIMECOMP CODEACCOUNTCOSTCENTERITEM_CODECOLLECTIONCHANNEL COUNTRY BRAND GENDERPRODUCT AmountExisting mix  Driver%
DT02BUDGET202412CC02AAC1SHOP1SL2000DM1M2USDM1M101,000.000.25
DT02BUDGET202412CC02AAC4SHOP1SL2000DM1M2USDM1M20500.000.125
DT02BUDGET202412CC02AAC1SHOP1SL2000DM1M2USDM1M302,500.000.625
DT02BUDGET202412CC02AAC2SHOP1SL2000DM1M2USDM1M403,500.001

Output after applying Driver to input Data

FINAL RESULT             
AUDIT TRAILVERSIONTIMECOMP CODEACCOUNTCOSTCENTERITEM_CODECOLLECTIONCHANNEL COUNTRY BRAND GENDERPRODUCT Amount
DT03BUDGET202412CC01AAC5COSTC1SL1000DM1M2USDM1M1050
DT03BUDGET202412CC01AAC5COSTC1SL1000DM1M2USDM1M2025
DT03BUDGET202412CC01AAC5COSTC1SL1000DM1M2USDM1M30125
             200.00

entry.title: Cross model copy from old model (Account base) to New Model (Measure base) in SAC
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Context:

We are trying to achieve copy the data from Account based model to Measure base through link function but  are facing some glitch in code.

Issue:

Code:

The below code is written to served the purpose but it is copying the Default currency data of old model to Local currency of new model. Moreover i don't see where the linkage for the measure can be given as source model doesn't have measure.

Request you to please provide your expert comments on the same.

 

**

MEMBERSET [d/Accounts] = BASEMEMBER([d/Accounts], "Rate", "Quantity", "Input",)

MODEL [Model_Old]

MEMBERSET [d/Date] = BASEMEMBER([d/Date], %DateN%)

MEMBERSET [d/Accounts] = BASEMEMBER([d/Accounts], "Rate", "Quantity", "Input",)

    ENDMODEL

DATA(

 [d/Accounts] = [Model_Old].[d/Accounts],

 [d/Date] = [Model_Old].[d/Date])

= LINK([Model_Old], [d/Version] = %SourceVersion%)

****

 

 

Regards,

entry.title: MS Office's "Monthly Enterprise Channel" compatibility with SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)
entry.content:
Hi , 

We currently run our MS Office apps clients on the Semi-Annual Enterprise release to ensure that builds only get new features twice per year and only security fixes the other months to minimize potential impact.

However , we would want to understand the impact of MS Office's "Monthly Enterprise channel" on the SAP Analytics Cloud , that upgrades quarterly by SAP. 

Please let me know , if the "Monthly Enterprise Channel" release of MS Office willbe compatible for SAC add in for MS Office , or is it not recommended. ?

Thanks in Advance for all your inputs. 

Anita Sonthalia

 

Kindly share the latest recommendations with respect to the above.

entry.title: How can we push data from SAP Group Reporting to SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) using Integration Suite?
entry.content:
Hello,

We are currently working on a use case where we need to push financial data from SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting to SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), and we would like to use SAP Integration Suite as the middleware platform for this integration.

We’re looking for guidance on the following points:

  1. Is there a standard or recommended approach to push Group Reporting data to SAC via Integration Suite?

  2. Are there any predefined integration flows (iFlows), APIs, or connectors that support this scenario?

  3. How can we handle authentication and connectivity between Group Reporting, Integration Suite, and SAC?

  4. how can we configure the connection to ensure tenant compatibility (e.g., eu10.analytics.cloud.sap)?

If you have documentation, sample configurations, or experience with a similar use case, your input would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: How to rename "Total" in SAC story
entry.content:
Hi,

How do i rename the "Total" in a row to "LOANS AND ADVANCES"

Thanks,

Mayura
